subject: fix(tooling): add ESLint as devDependency and resolve all 45 lint errors
body:
The project had eslint.config.js and a lint script but ESLint was never
installed — npm run lint would fail. Installed eslint@9.x, @eslint/js,
globals, eslint-plugin-react-hooks@7.x, and eslint-plugin-react-refresh
as devDependencies. Fixed all 45 lint errors across 17 files:

- Removed unused imports/destructures (AdCanvas, StyleTab, MediaTab, etc.)
- Moved ref-during-render assignments into useEffect (App, SaveLoadModal, useDarkMode)
- Fixed useIsMobile: use matchMedia in useState initializer
- Added missing beforeAll imports in test files
- Added global gtag declaration for Google Analytics
- Cleaned up stale eslint-disable directives and empty catch blocks
- Added argsIgnorePattern for PascalCase JSX component props
- Wrapped logical expression fallback in useMemo to stabilize deps
- Removed dead props from StyleTab/MediaTab and their call sites

Tags: tooling, lint, dx, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: minor
